mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS num, A.* FROM ( SELECT board.b_id AS b_id, b_title, b_thumbnail AS b_thumbnail, ROUND(AVG(b_review_score),1) AS b_review_score, COUNT(DISTINCT b_review_id) AS r_count, MIN(b_op_price) AS b_op_price, u_s_com, b_type FROM board,board_option,users_seller,review WHERE board.b_id = board_option.b_id AND board.u_s_id = users_seller.u_s_id AND board.b_id = review.b_id AND b_type='생활라이프' GROUP BY board.b_id,b_title,b_thumbnail,u_s_com,b_type ORDER BY b_id DESC ) A ) WHERE num BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*)/12.0) FROM board WHERE b_type='생활라이프'

SELECT b.b_id, b.b_thumbnail, b.b_title, b.b_type, b.b_view_count, b.b_content, b.b_prod_on_off, b.u_s_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review re WHERE re.b_id = b.b_id) AS r_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like bl WHERE bl.b_id = b.b_id) AS l_count, sel.u_s_com, sel.u_s_zone, sel.u_s_carrer, sel.u_s_profileimg_url FROM board b LEFT JOIN users_seller sel ON b.u_s_id = sel.u_s_id WHERE b.b_id = #{b_id}
SELECT b_img_url FROM board_image WHERE b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY b_img_id ASC

SELECT re.b_review_id, re.b_id, re.b_review_score, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(re.b_review_content, 4000, 1) AS b_review_content, re.b_review_createdat, u.u_nickname, u.u_profileimg_url FROM review re JOIN users u ON u.u_id = re.u_id WHERE re.b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY re.b_review_createdat DESC
SELECT r_image_url FROM review_image WHERE b_review_id = #{b_review_id} ORDER BY r_image_id ASC
SELECT b_id,ROUND(AVG(b_review_score),1) AS b_review_score FROM review WHERE b_id=#{b_id} GROUP BY b_id
